đź”´ **Tool Issue** â€” `CHANGELOG.md:5`
`### Features Added` section is empty for version `23.0.1`.

This PR makes multiple meaningful changes (removal of `| null` from many optional properties, emitter upgrade from `0.49.0` to `0.50.4`), but none are documented in the changelog. The auto-generation tooling should have populated this section.

**Fix:** Update `CHANGELOG.md` to describe what changed in 23.0.1 (e.g., type-safety fixes removing `| null` from optional fields). If these are considered breaking changes (assigning `null` was previously valid), add a `### Breaking Changes` section instead. Report any tooling gap in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

đź”´ **Tool Issue** â€” `package.json:97`
The `apiRefLink` field in the `//sampleConfiguration` comment is set to:
```
"(learn.microsoft.com/redacted)
```

This uses `?view=azure-node-preview`, but `@azure/arm-netapp@23.0.1` is a **stable** release. The correct query parameter for stable releases is `?view=azure-node-latest`.

**Fix:** Change `?view=azure-node-preview` â†’ `?view=azure-node-latest` in `package.json`, and report the issue in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

2 tooling issues found in `@azure/arm-netapp@23.0.1` (PR #37619, API version 2025-12-01, stable):

1. **Empty CHANGELOG entry** â€” `CHANGELOG.md` for version 23.0.1 has an empty `### Features Added` section. The PR removes `| null` from many optional properties (a type-safety improvement driven by emitter upgrade 0.49.0 â†’ 0.50.4) but none of these changes are documented.
2. **Incorrect `apiRefLink` view parameter** â€” `package.json` still uses `?view=azure-node-preview` for a stable release; should be `?view=azure-node-latest`.

No public API design issues were found (all new symbols follow naming conventions, `Known*` enums are present for all extensible string types, operations follow standard patterns).

Multiple type-safety fixes (| null removals) and emitter upgrade are not documented."},{"file":"sdk/netapp/arm-netapp/package.json","line":97,"issueType":"tool","category":"configuration","description":"apiRefLink uses ?view=azure-node-preview for stable release 23.0.1; should be ?view=azure-node-latest."}]}
